headline: Record operating income, revenue for Union Pacific in Q1
summary: Union Pacific delivered record operating income and revenue despite weaker international intermodal and automotive shipments that hurt overall freight volumes. The post Record operating income, revenue for Union Pacific in Q1 appeared first on FreightWaves.
